text:
since Youtube is being lame and won't let me respond to individual comments:

Breakfastiscoffee - thanks for the help XD

Piejee1 - sorry! i checked your requests and didn't see Gourmet Race... so i made it myself. is that alright?

to everyone who enjoys this - thanks for the compliments. glad you're enjoying these videos =D

and to everyone who's been picking on Stealthbeast, lighten up. he was joking. XD
he happens to be a friend of mine... and for the record, he 5'd this.

thanks, everyone!
